items.title: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast as Putin prepares for key speech
items.summary: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.

items.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
items.summary: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.

items.title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
items.summary: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 烏俄再度換俘 各換回185人
items.summary: 烏克蘭與俄羅斯今（5日）再度進行換俘，雙方各自交換了185名戰俘。烏克蘭方面指出，最年長的戰俘為62歲，大多數人自2022年以來便一直被俄羅斯囚禁。  《路透》報導，烏克蘭總...…

items.title: 這不是你的國家！ 黎巴嫩總統嚴批伊朗、拒當談判籌碼
items.summary: 伊朗堅持黎巴嫩為美伊停火條件，揚言若以色列不停止在黎國的攻擊行動，將暫停談判。黎巴嫩總統奧恩（Joseph Aoun）5日嚴詞駁斥伊朗，指控德黑蘭把黎巴嫩當籌碼。  在黎巴...…

items.title: AI「遞迴式自我改進」技術風險難料 Anthropic籲全球放緩研發腳步
items.summary: 美國人工智慧公司「Anthropic」的AI工具「Claude」在美軍對委內瑞拉的行動中扮演重要角色。即便成為AI軍事、安全應用領先者之一，Anthropic提出警告，AI發展...…
